message:
feat(fcp-cli): Enhance doctor command with simulation scenarios

- Add --scenario flag to test different health states:
  - healthy (default): All checks pass
  - degraded: System operational but stale checkpoint
  - stale-checkpoint: Checkpoint too old, operations limited
  - stale-revocation: Revocation list stale, high-risk blocked
  - network-partition: Limited connectivity, DERP unavailable
  - low-coverage: Store coverage below threshold
  - critical: Bootstrap incomplete, no transport paths

- Improve human-readable output:
  - Color-coded freshness levels
  - Transport policy section (LAN/DERP/Funnel)
  - Store coverage percentages
  - Degraded mode reasons with duration
  - Check results with FCP-XXXX reason codes

- Add exit code semantics:
  - 0 = OK (healthy)
  - 1 = FAIL (critical failures)
  - 2 = WARN (degraded but operational)

- Prepare for real mesh connectivity via FCP_MESH_ENDPOINT env var

Part of bead flywheel_connectors-1n78.22

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
